```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr auto 1fr;gap:0.9em;align-items:stretch;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:16px;padding:1.1em 1em 1.2em;text-align:left;border-top:4px solid #D45F47;box-shadow:0 10px 26px rgba(212,95,71,0.16);">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.5em;margin-bottom:0.7em;">
    <div style="width:1.9em;height:1.9em;border-radius:0.5em;background:#FCEEEC;border:1px solid #F0C5BA;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#D45F47;"><i data-lucide="repeat" style="width:0.95em;height:0.95em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
    <div style="font-size:0.62em;font-weight:700;color:#D45F47;">Without a skill</div>
   </div>
   <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.4em;">
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;background:#FBF5F4;border-radius:7px;padding:0.4em 0.6em;line-height:1.4;">"Generate a banner, 16:9, flat clean style, these colors, this taste..."</div>
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;background:#FBF5F4;border-radius:7px;padding:0.4em 0.6em;line-height:1.4;">"Generate a banner, 16:9, flat clean style, these colors..."</div>
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#C9A89F;background:#FBF5F4;border-radius:7px;padding:0.4em 0.6em;line-height:1.4;">"Generate a banner, 16:9, flat clean..."</div>
   </div>
   <div style="margin-top:0.7em;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B7068;line-height:1.45;">Same instructions, re-typed every time. Wasteful.</div>
  </div>

  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;color:#B5A78F;"><i data-lucide="arrow-right" style="width:1.4em;height:1.4em;stroke-width:2.2;"></i></div>

  <div style="background:#FFFBF3;border-radius:16px;padding:1.1em 1em 1.2em;text-align:left;border-top:4px solid #2C8475;box-shadow:0 10px 26px rgba(44,132,117,0.18);border:1.5px solid #C8E6C9;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.5em;margin-bottom:0.7em;">
    <div style="width:1.9em;height:1.9em;border-radius:0.5em;background:#E8F5E9;border:1px solid #C8E6C9;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#2C8475;"><i data-lucide="sparkles" style="width:0.95em;height:0.95em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
    <div style="font-size:0.62em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;">With a skill</div>
   </div>
   <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:center;gap:0.6em;min-height:5.4em;">
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.85em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;background:#E8F5E9;border:1px solid #C8E6C9;border-radius:9px;padding:0.45em 0.9em;">/ph-image</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;">The workflow is designed <strong>once</strong>, then invoked by name forever after.</div>
   </div>
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
